ARTICLE_BODY: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be the largest tournament in football history. Preparations are already underway in the three host countries: the United States, Canada, and Mexico. This will be the first World Cup with 48 teams instead of 32. The tournament will feature 104 matches across 16 cities. Officials expect over 5 million fans to attend the games. New stadiums are being built and existing ones are being upgraded to meet FIFA standards. The opening match will likely take place in Mexico City or Los Angeles. Transportation systems in host cities are being improved to handle the large crowds. Local businesses are excited about the economic benefits the World Cup will bring. The tournament promises to be a memorable experience for football fans worldwide. Ticket sales are expected to begin in 2025.
